questions: can I use dart without flutter?
answers: Dart is a client-optimized language developed by Google, primarily known as the language behind Flutter. It supports ahead-of-time compilation for fast mobile apps and JIT compilation for quick development.
Dart is Google's language for building cross-platform apps with Flutter. It has a familiar C-style syntax, null safety, async/await support, and compiles to native ARM code for excellent performance.
Dart was designed for building UIs with features like hot reload and a widget-based architecture through Flutter. It can also be used for server-side development and compiles to JavaScript.
Dart is worth learning if you're interested in Flutter for cross-platform mobile, web, and desktop development. Its sound null safety and strong typing help prevent common bugs.
